title: Job Openings at HCER Consulting Limited
content:
HCER Consulting Limited is a leading provider of innovative human resource solutions and professional training programs. We have earned a strong reputation for delivering consulting experiences that help clients build capable teams, strengthen leadership capacity, and improve organizational performance.

With a team of experienced HR and industry professionals, we combine strategic insight with practical experience to deliver measurable results. Our services cover the full spectrum of human capital development, including recruitment and selection, performance management, employee relations, HR outsourcing, learning and development, and organizational restructuring.
     

            
    



Our consulting and training portfolio also extends to business management, data analytics, personal development, and digital literacy, helping both organizations and individuals achieve sustainable growth and operational excellence

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Senior Solar Sales Representative

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are recruiting a Senior Solar Sales Officer to drive revenue growth for our solar solutions business.
	This role is ideal for a results-driven sales professional with solid experience in renewable energy or technical product sales.


Role Overview


	You will lead client acquisition efforts, manage the full sales cycle, and close high-value solar deals across residential and commercial segments.
	The role demands strong market knowledge, disciplined pipeline management, and consistent delivery on targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and convert new business opportunities for solar installations
	Manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to deal closure
	Conduct virtual product presentations and client consultations
	Prepare and present proposals tailored to client energy needs
	Build and maintain strong client relationships
	Track sales performance and maintain an active pipeline
	Collaborate with technical teams to ensure smooth project delivery
	Stay informed on solar market trends and competitor activity.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Master`s Degree
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in sales, with focus on solar, energy, or technical solutions
	Proven record of meeting or exceeding sales targets
	Strong understanding of solar products and energy solutions
	Excellent negotiation and closing skills
	Ability to work independently in a remote setting
	Strong communication and presentation skills.


What We’re Looking For:


	A self-driven professional with strong commercial focus
	High level of accountability and ownership
	Ability to build trust and influence client decisions
	Structured approach to sales and pipeline management.


Salary
N300,000 monthly + commission on sales.

Application Closing Date: 31st August, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail. 

 

 

2.) Head, Marketing

Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	Our client, a digital bank, is looking for a dynamic Head of Marketing to lead brand strategy, customer acquisition, and market positioning.
	This role is central to driving awareness, trust, and growth in a competitive digital banking landscape.
	This position is being recruited exclusively for female candidates as part of the bank's leadership diversity objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute the bank's overall marketing strategy across digital, social, and traditional channels
	Lead brand positioning, messaging, and customer communications to build trust and drive adoption
	Own customer acquisition and retention campaigns, working closely with Product and Growth teams
	Manage the marketing budget, agency relationships, and campaign ROI tracking
	Lead market research and competitor analysis to identify growth opportunities
	Build and mentor a high-performing marketing team
	Ensure all marketing communications comply with relevant advertising and financial services regulations
	Collaborate cross-functionally with Product, Customer Experience, and Compliance teams


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field (Master's an advantage)
	7–10 years of marketing experience, with at least 3 years in a senior/leadership role
	Experience in fintech, banking, or financial services marketing strongly preferred
	Strong track record in digital marketing, brand building, and customer acquisition at scale
	Data-driven approach with experience in marketing analytics and performance tracking
	Excellent communication, creative, and leadership skills.


Application Closing Date: 31st July, 2026. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to: [email protected] using "Head of Marketing" as the subject of the mail. 

Note: This role is open to female candidates only.

 

 

3.) Chief Technology Officer

Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	The ideal candidate will combine deep technical expertise with strong leadership skills to drive innovation, ensure system reliability, and support the bank's growth in a highly regulated digital finance environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Define and execute the overall technology strategy, aligned with business goals and regulatory requirements (CBN guidelines, data protection standards, etc.)
	Oversee the architecture, security, and scalability of the bank's core banking platform, mobile/web applications, and APIs
	Lead, mentor, and grow high-performing engineering, DevOps, and product development teams
	Ensure robust cybersecurity practices, data privacy compliance, and system uptime/resilience
	Manage relationships with technology vendors, fintech partners, and core banking solution providers
	Drive adoption of emerging technologies (AI, cloud infrastructure, open banking APIs) to maintain competitive advantage
	Collaborate with Risk, Compliance, and Operations to ensure technology supports regulatory obligations (CBN, NDIC, BOFIA 2020)
	Own the technology budget, infrastructure costs, and vendor contracts


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (Master's/MBA an advantage)
	Minimum of 8–10 years of progressive technology leadership experience, with at least 3–5 years in a senior leadership role (CTO, VP Engineering, Head of Technology)
	Proven experience in fintech, digital banking, or financial services technology
	Strong understanding of core banking systems, cloud architecture, API integrations, and cybersecurity frameworks
	Familiarity with Nigerian regulatory technology requirements (CBN, NDIC, NITDA/NDPR) is a strong advantage
	Excellent leadership, stakeholder management, and strategic communication skills


Application Closing Date: 31st July, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to: [email protected] using "Chief Technology Officer" as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

	We are looking for a Medical administrative assistant to organize our medical facility&rsquo;s functions.

Medical Administrative Assistant Job at Uprightmarket




        
    

        
        Uprightmarket operates an investment and training platform that provides accredited investors with access to alternative investment opportunities beyond traditional stocks, real estate , commodities and bonds. These include, hedge funds, private equity, real estate funds, and digital assets.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Administrative Assistant
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are looking for a Medical administrative assistant to organize our medical facility’s functions.
	You will support day-to-day operations by performing administrative tasks and ensuring high quality customer service for our patients.


Responsibilities


	Interview patients for case histories prior to appointments
	Update and maintain patients’ health records
	Assist patients with initial paperwork
	Schedule and coordinate appointments
	Process insurance claims in compliance with law requirements
	Use medical software to support all transactions
	Manage receivable and payable accounts and maintain financial records
	Answer patients’ queries and ensure quality customer service
	Collaborate with doctors and nurses to help with medical examinations, schedule tests and order supplies
	Ensure compliance with procedures
	Keep up-to-date with changes in medical and insurance legislation


Requirements and Skills


	Hands on experience with medical software and MS Office
	Knowledge of healthcare operations
	Familiarity with medical and insurance legislation
	Excellent organizational and multitasking skills
	Customer-oriented communication skills


Salary
N160,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Web Developer",
  "description": "Compovine Technologies Limited is a Nigerian Information Technology (IT) company that provides computer hardware, software, networking solutions, and IT support services to individuals, businesses, schools, banks, and government organizations. The company was incorporated on 14 May 2004 and has grown into one of Nigeria&#39;s major IT solution providers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Web Developer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Web Developer will be responsible for designing, developing, testing, and maintaining responsive, secure, and high-performing websites and web applications.
	The successful candidate will work closely with designers, project managers, and other developers to create exceptional digital experiences that support the company&#39;s business objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, and maintain company websites and web applications.
	Build responsive and user-friendly interfaces compatible with multiple devices and browsers.
	Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code.
	Integrate websites with databases, APIs, and third-party services.
	Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve website issues promptly.
	Optimize website speed, performance, and security.
	Collaborate with UI/UX designers to implement visually appealing designs.
	Perform regular updates, backups, and maintenance of web platforms.
	Stay updated with emerging web technologies and recommend improvements.
	Ensure compliance with web accessibility, security, and industry best practices.


Educational Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.
	Relevant professional certifications in web development will be an added advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in web development or a related role.
	Demonstrated portfolio of completed web development projects.
	Experience working in an IT solutions or technology-driven environment is an advantage.


Required Skills:


	Proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and responsive web design.
	Experience with front-end frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js.
	Knowledge of back-end technologies such as PHP, Node.js, or Python.
	Experience with MySQL, PostgreSQL, or other relational databases.
	Familiarity with RESTful APIs and version control tools such as Git.
	Understanding of website security and performance optimization.
	Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.


Other Requirements:





	Strong attention to detail and commitment to quality.
	High level of integrity and professionalism.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team.
	Willingness to learn new technologies and adapt to changing business needs.
	Excellent time management and organizational skills.


Remuneration


	Competitive salary based on qualifications and experience.
	Professional development and training opportunities.
	Career growth within a dynamic technology company.
	Other benefits in line with the company&#39;s employment policies.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Curriculum Vitae (CV), cover letter, and portfolio of recent web development projects to:&nbsp;&nbsp;ipuole.cletus@compovine.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Web Developer Job at Compovine Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Compovine Technologies Limited is a Nigerian Information Technology (IT) company that provides computer hardware, software, networking solutions, and IT support services to individuals, businesses, schools, banks, and government organizations. The company was incorporated on 14 May 2004 and has grown into one of Nigeria's major IT solution providers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Web Developer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

            
    




	The Web Developer will be responsible for designing, developing, testing, and maintaining responsive, secure, and high-performing websites and web applications.
	The successful candidate will work closely with designers, project managers, and other developers to create exceptional digital experiences that support the company's business objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, and maintain company websites and web applications.
	Build responsive and user-friendly interfaces compatible with multiple devices and browsers.
	Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code.
	Integrate websites with databases, APIs, and third-party services.
	Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve website issues promptly.
	Optimize website speed, performance, and security.
	Collaborate with UI/UX designers to implement visually appealing designs.
	Perform regular updates, backups, and maintenance of web platforms.
	Stay updated with emerging web technologies and recommend improvements.
	Ensure compliance with web accessibility, security, and industry best practices.


Educational Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.
	Relevant professional certifications in web development will be an added advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in web development or a related role.
	Demonstrated portfolio of completed web development projects.
	Experience working in an IT solutions or technology-driven environment is an advantage.


Required Skills:


	Proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and responsive web design.
	Experience with front-end frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js.
	Knowledge of back-end technologies such as PHP, Node.js, or Python.
	Experience with MySQL, PostgreSQL, or other relational databases.
	Familiarity with RESTful APIs and version control tools such as Git.
	Understanding of website security and performance optimization.
	Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.


Other Requirements:





	Strong attention to detail and commitment to quality.
	High level of integrity and professionalism.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team.
	Willingness to learn new technologies and adapt to changing business needs.
	Excellent time management and organizational skills.


Remuneration


	Competitive salary based on qualifications and experience.
	Professional development and training opportunities.
	Career growth within a dynamic technology company.
	Other benefits in line with the company's employment policies.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Curriculum Vitae (CV), cover letter, and portfolio of recent web development projects to:  [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Its primary business includes the importation, storage, marketing and distribution of Bitumen, Bituminous products and Automotive Gas Oil (AGO) in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Officer

Job Location: Kano

Job Description


	We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Logistics Officer to coordinate transportation, inventory, and distribution activities, ensuring the efficient, timely, and cost-effective movement of goods across our operations.


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc. or HND in Logistics &amp; Supply Chain Management, Transport Management, Business Administration, Engineering or a related disciple.
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in logistics, transport management or haulage operations within the haulage, oil and gas, and manufacturing or related industry.
	Demonstrable experience in truck scheduling, dispatch coordination, fleet operations and customer order fulfilment. Experience working with logistics management systems, ERP platforms and Microsoft Excel will be an added advantage.
	Extensive knowledge of logistics, transportation and distribution management within a multi- location operation. Sound understanding of fleet coordination, truck scheduling, loading and dispatch processes. Good understanding of transport documentation, waybill administration and operational reporting. Good knowledge of haulage operations, delivery planning and customer order fulfilment. Good understanding of customer service principles and operational compliance within the oil and gas or haulage industry. Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, logistics, fleet management and enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CVs to: careers@ascanigeria.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Logistics Officer Job at Ringardas Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Ringardas Nigeria Limited is a private limited liability company incorporated under the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria on 22nd November, 2005. Its primary business includes the importation, storage, marketing and distribution of Bitumen, Bituminous products and Automotive Gas Oil (AGO) in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Officer

Job Location: Kano

Job Description
     

            
    




	We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Logistics Officer to coordinate transportation, inventory, and distribution activities, ensuring the efficient, timely, and cost-effective movement of goods across our operations.


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc. or HND in Logistics & Supply Chain Management, Transport Management, Business Administration, Engineering or a related disciple.
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in logistics, transport management or haulage operations within the haulage, oil and gas, and manufacturing or related industry.
	Demonstrable experience in truck scheduling, dispatch coordination, fleet operations and customer order fulfilment. Experience working with logistics management systems, ERP platforms and Microsoft Excel will be an added advantage.
	Extensive knowledge of logistics, transportation and distribution management within a multi- location operation. Sound understanding of fleet coordination, truck scheduling, loading and dispatch processes. Good understanding of transport documentation, waybill administration and operational reporting. Good knowledge of haulage operations, delivery planning and customer order fulfilment. Good understanding of customer service principles and operational compliance within the oil and gas or haulage industry. Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, logistics, fleet management and enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Direct Sales Agent",
  "description": "Catilas Resources Limited is an outsourcing and advisory services Company. Our focus is to help our clients leverage their core capabilities to optimize market opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Direct Sales Agent
Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Direct Sales Agent is responsible for driving the acquisition of new customers and promoting the bank&rsquo;s products and services to meet assigned sales targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify, approach, and onboard new customers for the bank&rsquo;s products.
	Actively market and sell assigned banking products to individuals and businesses.
	Meet or exceed monthly sales targets.
	Ensure full compliance with the bank&rsquo;s policies, KYC, and regulatory requirements.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with customers to support retention and referrals.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND in any discipline with lower credit
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Target-driven, self-motivated, and result-oriented.
	Age limit is 30 years or below.


Salary


	N107,000 per month plus commission
	Other Benefits: HMO, 13th Month and Leave allowance.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested candidates should send their CV to: fazeez@catilas.com using the Job Position and Preferred Location as the subject of the mail.",

Direct Sales Agent Job at Catilas Resources Limited




        
    

        
        Catilas Resources Limited is an outsourcing and advisory services Company. Our focus is to help our clients leverage their core capabilities to optimize market opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Direct Sales Agent
Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Direct Sales Agent is responsible for driving the acquisition of new customers and promoting the bank’s products and services to meet assigned sales targets.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Identify, approach, and onboard new customers for the bank’s products.
	Actively market and sell assigned banking products to individuals and businesses.
	Meet or exceed monthly sales targets.
	Ensure full compliance with the bank’s policies, KYC, and regulatory requirements.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with customers to support retention and referrals.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND in any discipline with lower credit
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Target-driven, self-motivated, and result-oriented.
	Age limit is 30 years or below.


Salary


	N107,000 per month plus commission
	Other Benefits: HMO, 13th Month and Leave allowance.


Method of Application 
Interested candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Preferred Location as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
